title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: Ryland Grace is the sole survivor on a desperate, last-chance mission—and if he fails, humanity and the earth itself will perish. A gripping tale of survival, science, and the power of friendship.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: The definitive guide to breaking bad behaviors and adopting good ones in four steps, showing you how small, incremental, everyday routines compound into massive, positive change over time.

title: Oh, the Places You'll Go!
author: Dr. Seuss
description: Dr. Seuss’s wonderfully wise graduation speech is the perfect send-off for children starting out in the world, from nursery school to college and beyond!
